raw_consumer_statement: In XXXX someone fraudulently opened a Best Buy credit account under my name and information without my knowledge or consent. Without knowing the account went delinquent and was sent to collections. In XXXX a judge ordered in favor the collections company garnish my wages for the charges. I still at this time didnt know of any charges or lawsuit due to my address being different from the card. Now here in XXXX the court is still trying to garnish my wages.
